title: The Trouble With Truffles

jokes.text: I beat him up and took his hat! It's really nice. I hope he's not hurt too bad.
jokes.setup: Character casually mentions beating up an elderly one-legged cowboy
jokes.punchline: The casual concern about his wellbeing after the violent robbery
jokes.explanation: Dark humor that perfectly captures Bender's casual sociopathy with the afterthought concern

jokes.text: It's fun 'cause there's no touching and lots of rules.
jokes.setup: Professor confused by line dancing
jokes.punchline: Leela's explanation perfectly describes why she'd like line dancing
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment - Leela would love an activity with rules and no touching

jokes.text: I have a way with bucking mechanical things.
jokes.setup: Bender boasts about his skill with mechanical bull
jokes.punchline: The obvious sexual innuendo from a robot
jokes.explanation: Predictable innuendo but fits Bender's character

jokes.text: If I don't set a new club record, I'll eat my hat.
jokes.setup: Bender makes confident boast using common idiom
jokes.punchline: Sets up the literal hat-eating that follows
jokes.explanation: Good setup for the subversion to come - taking idiom literally

jokes.text: 0.4 seconds! A new club record for shortest ride.
jokes.setup: Bender's confident boast about setting a record
jokes.punchline: He does set a record - for failing spectacularly
jokes.explanation: Perfect misdirection - technically he did set a record, just not the kind he wanted

jokes.text: Still, someone should eat the hat.
jokes.setup: Bender's earlier boast about eating his hat if he failed
jokes.punchline: He suggests someone else should fulfill his promise
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender move - dodging responsibility for his own words

jokes.text: Oh, no. It's achieved consciousness! God forgive us for creating this.
jokes.setup: Mechanical bull malfunctions
jokes.punchline: Treating a simple malfunction as robot uprising
jokes.explanation: Dark sci-fi parody - treating mechanical bull like Frankenstein's monster

jokes.text: My hand is stuck! There must be glue on the saddle!
jokes.setup: Leela explains why she couldn't let go of the bull
jokes.punchline: Sets up the medical revelation about suction cups
jokes.explanation: Misdirection setup for the squidification reveal

jokes.text: You're breaking out in suction cups.
jokes.setup: Looking for medical explanation for stuck hand
jokes.punchline: The absurd diagnosis of growing suction cups
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurdist moment - completely unexpected medical condition

jokes.text: I probably gave it to you! Sometimes I don't wash my hands for years at a time.
jokes.setup: Discussing how Leela got squidification
jokes.punchline: Fry's disgusting hygiene admission
jokes.explanation: Perfect gross-out Fry moment with TMI overshare

jokes.text: There are still so many things I wanted to let go of!
jokes.setup: Leela lamenting her condition
jokes.punchline: Pun on 'letting go' - both emotional and physical with suction cups
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay that works on multiple levels with her condition

jokes.text: Zoidberg? (popping)
jokes.setup: Fry declares his love regardless of what monster she becomes
jokes.punchline: Leela's confused reaction as Zoidberg makes popping sounds
jokes.explanation: Good reaction beat - Leela confused about who Fry is talking to

jokes.text: Isn't it bad enough that I occasionally lay an egg?
jokes.setup: Leela complaining about being cursed
jokes.punchline: Casual mention of occasionally laying eggs
jokes.explanation: Brilliant throwaway line that adds absurd new Leela biology fact

jokes.text: (singsong): He's single.
jokes.setup: Parents trying to set Leela up with sewer mutant
jokes.punchline: Mother's enthusiastic matchmaking sing-song delivery
jokes.explanation: Typical embarrassing parent moment with musical delivery

jokes.text: Giant beans? They must be worth a fortune!
jokes.setup: Stranger mentions magic beans as cure
jokes.punchline: Fry immediately assumes they're valuable without questioning the magic part
jokes.explanation: Perfect Fry logic - focuses on wrong aspect of obviously suspicious offer

jokes.text: They're the cure-all that cures a lot! Rheumatism, botulism, seborrhea, diarrhea, desiccation, perspiration, common cold and, uh... Um, uh... Squidification?
jokes.setup: Salesman listing diseases the beans cure
jokes.punchline: Long medical list ending with obviously made-up squidification
jokes.explanation: Classic snake oil salesman routine with improvised medical conditions

jokes.text: You sack of bags of buckets of idiots!
jokes.setup: Fry reveals his terrible bean deal
jokes.punchline: Bender's escalating insult structure
jokes.explanation: Creative compound insult with escalating containers metaphor

jokes.text: "Fry, you big dummy"? Very much so.
jokes.setup: Fry asks if they think he's a dummy
jokes.punchline: Leela's matter-of-fact confirmation
jokes.explanation: Perfect deadpan Leela delivery with brutal honesty

jokes.text: Eh, I'll take the beanstalk less traveled.
jokes.setup: Fry deciding to climb the beanstalk
jokes.punchline: Robert Frost poem reference adapted to beanstalks
jokes.explanation: Clever literary pun that works well with fairy tale setting

jokes.text: I've never been up this high before. Well, outer space, I guess.
jokes.setup: Fry amazed at height of beanstalk
jokes.punchline: Remembering he regularly travels through space
jokes.explanation: Good callback to show's sci-fi setting contradicting current amazement

jokes.text: It's some kind of deluxe apartment in the sky.
jokes.setup: Fry discovers floating facility
jokes.punchline: Jeffersons theme song reference
jokes.explanation: Straightforward pop culture reference without much twist

jokes.text: This situation deteriorated fast.
jokes.setup: Fry captured by giant
jokes.punchline: Understated assessment of being captured
jokes.explanation: Good understated reaction to dramatic situation change

jokes.text: That is one skugly critter.
jokes.setup: Walt sees Fry
jokes.punchline: Portmanteau of 'skull' and 'ugly'
jokes.explanation: Decent made-up word combining skull and ugly

jokes.text: It's not a pun, it's a play on words!
jokes.setup: Walt compliments Mom's 'above the law' pun
jokes.punchline: Mom's pedantic correction about wordplay terminology
jokes.explanation: Great meta joke about comedy terminology with Mom's pedantic character

jokes.text: You can't just meddle with life like that. Who do you think you are-- god?
jokes.setup: Leela morally outraged at genetic engineering
jokes.punchline: Classic 'playing god' accusation
jokes.explanation: Standard moral outrage line, sets up Mom's response

jokes.text: I wish. Then I could stop these things from collapsing under their own weight.
jokes.setup: Leela accuses Mom of playing god
jokes.punchline: Mom wishes she were god to solve engineering problems
jokes.explanation: Brilliant subversion - she wants god powers for practical engineering reasons

jokes.text: Find yourself a porcupine, blast some pig dna into it, microwave till juicy. (bell dings) and bang! You've got a cocktail treat complete with built-in toothpicks.
jokes.setup: Mom explaining her genetic engineering products
jokes.punchline: Describing horrific genetic manipulation as casual recipe
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly horrific genetic engineering described as cooking recipe

jokes.text: It's where I keep my warning signs, all right? Stop asking questions!
jokes.setup: Leela asks what horrors are behind mysterious door
jokes.punchline: Mom's defensive mundane explanation
jokes.explanation: Good misdirection with anticlimactic door contents

jokes.text: Genes with a 'g'! Now, that's a pun.
jokes.setup: Mom mentions wanting to see what's in Leela's genes
jokes.punchline: Walt's correction about pun terminology, Mom's acknowledgment
jokes.explanation: Nice callback to earlier wordplay terminology debate

jokes.text: Last night in the bathtub, I ate a whole box of taco shells.
jokes.setup: Fry expressing how much he misses Leela
jokes.punchline: Bizarre depression eating behavior
jokes.explanation: Perfectly bizarre Fry depression behavior with specific weird detail

jokes.text: Yes, I was there.
jokes.setup: Fry's intimate confession about eating taco shells in bathtub
jokes.punchline: Bender's matter-of-fact confirmation he witnessed it
jokes.explanation: Perfect deadpan Bender moment that makes the scene even weirder

jokes.text: Well, you didn't!
jokes.setup: Fry says he called to ask where Leela is
jokes.punchline: Father's indignant correction about the conversation
jokes.explanation: Good reaction beat pointing out Fry's logical error

jokes.text: Whoa! Remember that mural on my cousin's van?
jokes.setup: Fry and Bender falling through clouds
jokes.punchline: Random specific reference to cousin's van mural
jokes.explanation: Good Fry-specific random memory triggered by fantasy scene

jokes.text: That's not hair.
jokes.setup: Leela lets down her hair for them to climb
jokes.punchline: Bender's matter-of-fact correction about tentacles
jokes.explanation: Great deadpan observation about the obvious tentacle situation

jokes.text: Holy rapunzel, man-bat!
jokes.setup: Seeing Fry and Bender climbing up
jokes.punchline: Batman reference mixed with fairy tale situation
jokes.explanation: Decent mashup of Batman and fairy tale references

jokes.text: How dynamic are they? Not very.
jokes.setup: Leela asks how dynamic the rescue duo is
jokes.punchline: Fry's honest self-assessment
jokes.explanation: Good self-aware moment about their heroic inadequacy

jokes.text: Instead, I went to bed because I'm tired now.
jokes.setup: Leela directs them to hugging corner
jokes.punchline: Bender's non-sequitur about going to bed
jokes.explanation: Classic Bender selfish moment disrupting emotional reunion

jokes.text: Sorry I screamed, leela. I was just so... Excited to see you.
jokes.setup: Fry screamed when he saw Leela's tentacles
jokes.punchline: His awkward cover story about being 'excited'
jokes.explanation: Good awkward Fry moment trying to cover his horrified reaction

jokes.text: You can't bend a wooden door! (hushed): I know that, and you know that. But this door looks pretty stupid.
jokes.setup: Leela points out Bender can't bend wood
jokes.punchline: Bender's logic about the door's intelligence
jokes.explanation: Great Bender logic about tricking an inanimate object

jokes.text: What time is it? Time for you to shut up!
jokes.setup: Someone asks what time it is
jokes.punchline: Aggressive non-time response
jokes.explanation: Generic aggressive response to time question

jokes.text: Fee-fi-fo-fum! You had me at 'fee'!
jokes.setup: Giant starts traditional fairy tale chant
jokes.punchline: Fry's rom-com reference interrupting
jokes.explanation: Good mashup of fairy tale and romantic comedy tropes

jokes.text: Memo to self: Breed giant cat to drag things in.
jokes.setup: Mom comments on what the cat dragged in
jokes.punchline: Her literal interpretation for future genetic engineering
jokes.explanation: Perfect Mom moment taking idiom literally for evil science

jokes.text: Wait. Crashing what with who in it?
jokes.setup: Plan to crash ship with them in it
jokes.punchline: Fry's delayed realization of the problem
jokes.explanation: Good delayed reaction beat showing Fry's slow processing

jokes.text: I say, I say, the sky is falling!
jokes.setup: Sky facility crashes to earth
jokes.punchline: Chicken Little reference with Foghorn Leghorn speech pattern
jokes.explanation: Good cartoon reference for the literally falling sky situation

jokes.text: And remember, don't report them missing till after we max out their credit cards.
jokes.setup: Crew returns from apparent death
jokes.punchline: Hermes' casual mention of credit card fraud plan
jokes.explanation: Perfect casual Hermes bureaucratic evil

jokes.text: Listen, fry, whatever it was that you and I had together... Goulash? No! Well, I don't know. Maybe it was goulash.
jokes.setup: Leela trying to have serious relationship talk
jokes.punchline: Getting derailed by Fry's food reference
jokes.explanation: Good derailment of serious moment by Fry's literal food interpretation

jokes.text: Fee-fi, hi. (chuckles): I'm stan.
jokes.setup: Everyone expects giant to be scary
jokes.punchline: Friendly introduction subverting fairy tale expectations
jokes.explanation: Excellent subversion of fairy tale giant trope with friendly introduction

jokes.text: And once that genie's out of the bottle... I can cure you, too. Okay, I'm in.
jokes.setup: Leela making moral argument against genetic engineering
jokes.punchline: Immediately abandoning principles when offered cure
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment showing how quickly principles crumble when self-interest kicks in

tmdb_overview: Bender and his trusty pig set off to hunt space truffles in the truffle belt.
